title: STEVE's Second Chance
description:
You can't die for the first time if you slept.
Based on OMORI's Plot Armor
body:
Based on OMORI's Plot Armor If you sleep, you will have "Second Chance" (Plot Armor) which will prevent you from dying in the first time, like the Totem of Undying. ## When activated It saves from death, but you will have only 1 hp.
You will hear beeps for 30 seconds, at the end you will be healed by 1 hp. ## Since from v1.1 the 3rd chance has been added. Hold **Kitchen Knife** in inventory before sleep to get 3rd chance.
**About 3rd chance:** - Activetes before "2nd chance" (if you want you can call it now "last chance") - It doesn't have "Plot Armor" effect. - When Activeted: - Heals player on half of max health. - Grants Speed to escape for 2.5 seconds.
